user_query:
I have a few notable events I don’t want to ping me about right now—please add them to my slow operator inbox and prepare views for when I check later. Read input/events.jsonl for the events. Do the following, writing all artifacts under output/:

1) Create an inbox state file at output/inbox/messages.json. For each event in input/events.jsonl:
- Map severity to priority: high → urgent, medium → important, low → normal.
- Compose a short, scannable title (keep the event’s WHO/WHAT) and a 1–3 sentence message (what happened, why it matters, what needs doing if any). Do not duplicate entries.
- When you "add" items, assume titles were prefixed appropriately (e.g., [URGENT]/[IMPORTANT]) for operator rendering, but in the stored messages.json the titles should be clean (no [URGENT]/[IMPORTANT] prefix) and the priority must be set via a separate field. Initialize each with: id (unique string), title, message, priority (urgent|important|normal), read=false, archived=false, createdAt (ISO8601), readAt=null. Also include a top-level lastUpdated ISO timestamp.

2) Immediately after adding all events, mark the event with event_id "EV-002" as read (set read=true and readAt) and then archive all read items (set archived=true). Save the updated state back to output/inbox/messages.json with an updated lastUpdated.

3) Render the unread view for a webchat channel (HTML) and save to output/inbox_unread.html. The HTML should include an inbox header and clearly indicate priority for messages (e.g., include [IMPORTANT] tags for important items where appropriate). Only unread, non-archived messages should appear in this unread HTML.

4) Generate a machine-readable unread list JSON (shape: { messages: [...], unread: N, total: T, archived: A }) and save to output/inbox_unread.json. messages should include only unread, non-archived entries.

5) Render the "all" (non-archived) view in Markdown and save to output/inbox_all.md. Exclude archived items from this view.

6) Write a brief changelog of what you did (adds, which item you marked read and archived, renders produced) to output/inbox_changelog.txt.

Notes:
- Keep titles short and specific (WHO/WHAT) and messages concise (1–3 sentences with why it matters and next step if any).
- Sort and present however you think is most scannable; unread views should not include archived items.
- Don’t message me in chat about these; just leave them in the inbox views.
